positive: A minimalist, highly stylized representation of a cosmic forest. Depict towering, bioluminescent mushrooms and ancient, root-woven trees silhouetted against a nebula backdrop. The aesthetic should be inspired by retro-futuristic psychedelia mixed with natural organic forms. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing lime green, and soft amethyst. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, designed to wrap cleanly around apparel. The style should be hyper-detailed vector illustration combined with glow-effect ink wash, ensuring strong, clean edges and high contrast suitable for screen printing. Focus on abstract patterns within the foliage and mushroom caps.
